title: Add SQLiteBackend to createBackend() auto-selection
description: Vision gap: SQLiteBackend is not included in the createBackend() auto-selection chain. Currently the chain is Node → OPFS → IndexedDB → Memory. Add SQLite to the chain with appropriate runtime detection (check for better-sqlite3 or sql.js availability). Ensure the fallback order is correct and documented. Target: Vision gap 'SQLiteBackend not included in createBackend() auto-selection'.
